Units or supporters will appear in accordance with the drop rates listed below.
*Each pull is determined using the indicated percentage.
*Other than the 10th pull on a 10-time pull, the drop rates are as shown in the "Use 1 time" and "Use 10 times (1st–9th)" lists.
*One SSR or higher unit or supporter is guaranteed to appear on a 10-time pull. The drop rates are as shown in the "Use 10 times (10th)" list.
*The drop rates are rounded down to the nearest 100 million. The total number of the listed drop rates may not add up to 100%.
*More than one of the same units or supporters may appear from this Unit Assembly.

Units will appear in accordance with the drop rates listed below.
*Each pull is determined using the indicated percentage.
*One UR unit is guaranteed to appear on a 10-time pull. The drop rates are as shown in the "Use 10 times (10th)" list.
*Drop rates aside from the tenth draw in a pull of ten follow the list for draws from first to ninth in a pull of ten.
*The drop rates are rounded down to the nearest 100 million. The total number of the listed drop rates may not add up to 100%.
*More than one of the same units may appear from this Unit Assembly.

Units or supporters will appear in accordance with the drop rates listed below.
*Each pull is determined using the indicated percentage.
*Other than the 10th pull on a 10-time pull, the drop rates are as shown in the "Use 1 time" and "Use 10 times (1st–9th)" lists.
*One SSR or higher unit or supporter is guaranteed to appear on a 10-time pull. The drop rates are as shown in the "Use 10 times (10th)" list.
*The 100th cumulative pull is guaranteed to be a UR unit. The drop rates are as shown in the "Guaranteed UR Unit (100th Total)" list.
*When the 100th pull is also the 10th pull of a 10-time pull, the drop rates for the "Guaranteed UR Unit (100th Total)" will be applied instead of those for the 10-time pull (10th).
*The drop rates are rounded down to the nearest 100 million. The total number of the listed drop rates may not add up to 100%.
*More than one of the same units or supporters may appear from this Unit Assembly.

Units or supporters will appear in accordance with the drop rates listed below.
*Each pull is determined using the indicated percentage.
*Other than the 10th pull on a 10-time pull, the drop rates are as shown in the "Use 1 time" and "Use 10 times (1st–9th)" lists.
*One SSR or higher unit or supporter is guaranteed to appear on a 10-time pull. The drop rates are as shown in the "Use 10 times (10th)" list.
*The 50th cumulative pull is guaranteed to be a UR unit. The drop rates are as shown in the "Guaranteed UR Unit (50th Total)" list.
*When the 50th pull is also the 10th pull of a 10-time pull, the drop rates for the "Guaranteed UR Unit (50th Total)" will be applied instead of those for the 10-time pull (10th).
*The drop rates are rounded down to the nearest 100 million. The total number of the listed drop rates may not add up to 100%.
*More than one of the same units or supporters may appear from this Unit Assembly.
*Units pulled cannot be developed. *Cannot get duplicate characters. (Excluding Linked Characters)

*Available from April 1 at 12:00 PM JST.
*After the availability period for the Unit Assembly ends, any unused Unit Assembly Tickets will be converted into Rare Medals.
